mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM gh_order_audit a WHERE a.order_id = #{orderId} AND a.role_id = #{roleId} AND a.audit_status = 'pending' AND ( -- 如果是第一步（step_order = 1），直接可以审核 a.step_order = 1 OR -- 如果不是第一步，需要检查前一步是否已经全部完成 ( a.step_order > 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( -- 检查前一步（step_order - 1）是否还有未完成的审核 SELECT 1 FROM gh_order_audit prev WHERE prev.order_id = a.order_id AND prev.step_order = a.step_order - 1 AND prev.audit_status != 'approved' ) ) ) ORDER BY a.step_order ASC LIMIT 1
